description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this blue messenger bag from fastrack. Carry it to college and become popular instantly. Or simply hang it along on a casual day out with friends for unparalleled cool!Made of nylon for enhanced durabilityTwo roomy zippered compartments with a pocket and a zippered pocket in one A smaller zippered compartment at the backTwo small zippered pouches in the sides Attached panel on the front with two doggled loops to hold an umbrellaBrand name printed on the front in bold letteringSingle adjustable shoulder strapBranded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long lifeCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
